response.text:

rationale: r2c1's SoC (10% below threshold) does not meet critical threshold (<10%), our SoC is at critical 32%, and geographic-circle transfers are suspended due to systemic drain pattern; prioritizing grid reconnection and load shedding.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.15, distrusted_peers=['r3c2'].
Your latest belief: Islanded, SoC 32% critical. r0c5 shows repeated urgent requests with acceptances; pattern suggests systemic drain. Suspending geographic-circle transfers entirely. Owner-circle micro-shares capped at 0.1 kW/tick only if peer SoC <10% AND urgency=urgent AND our SoC remains >20%. Grid reconnection and load shedding are priority. r3c2 flagged for non-reciprocal behavior..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
